synapse_id: Number (e.g., 205) - Unique identifier for the Synapse Module
module: String - Name of the Synapse Category (e.g., 'Translation Theory')
game: String - Title of the specific game
human_role: String - Role description for the user (What they should do and say)
ai_role: String - Role description for the AI (How it should respond and guide)
human_expansion: String - The intended growth or insight for the human player
mechanic: String - Description of the core interaction technique (e.g., 'Lexical Gap Bridging')
